creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

To submitter: I'm afraid the PR database isn't the place to ask for help 
with this problem: the issue appears to be with Gnome, and not FreeBSD. 

I'd recommend you email the freebsd-questions@freebsd.org mailing list 
with full details of your machine (including the output of "ifconfig -a", 
"hostname" and "cat /etc/hosts") where there is more of a chance you will 
be able to find help.
